name: InsightsRecoveryManifestAndReceipts
description: Private backup, independent verification, restore-candidate, generation, and metadata-only status contracts.
schema_def: BackupManifest {artifactId, createdAt, sourceGenerationFingerprint, storageVersion, reportCount, payloadCount, restatementLinkCount, deletionEventCount, terminalIdempotencyCount, retainedPolicyFingerprints, tableFingerprints, artifactFingerprint, permissionEvidence}.
BackupReceipt {artifactId, manifestFingerprint, verificationFingerprint, operationOutcomeRef}; no private path or financial payload.
VerificationReceipt {artifactId, storageCompatibility, integrityState, countChecks, linkChecks, payloadFingerprintChecks, idempotencyChecks, deletionChecks, permissionChecks, verifiedAt}.
RestoreReceipt {sourceArtifactId, priorGenerationFingerprint, activatedGenerationFingerprint, storageVersion, migrationEvidence, verificationFingerprint, activatedAt, operationOutcomeRef}.
StoreStatus {activeGenerationFingerprint, storageVersion, integrityState, retainedCount, deletedCount, latestDurableBackupOrRestoreVerification?, supportedPolicyVersions[]}.

Backup saga: active store records Attempting before artifact work; candidate copies prior terminal outcomes but excludes the current Attempting row because it is not a successful point-in-time outcome; atomic publication precedes terminal receipt; exact replay reconciles a verified published artifact; completed failure removes the reservation.
Standalone Verify is read-only and is not persisted into StoreStatus. Restore candidate must fully verify before atomic CURRENT replacement; expected-current mismatch leaves active state unchanged.
